scenes.text:
You cannot have a million-dollar dream
with a minimum-wage work ethic.

Look at your daily schedule. Where are the hours going? If you spend more time on entertainment than education, more time consuming than
creating, more time complaining than building, your results will reflect exactly that. Your calendar does not lie. It shows your real priorities.

Something has to go. Maybe it is Netflix. Maybe it is toxic friendships. Maybe it is the three hours of scrolling.
Whatever it is, until you sacrifice what is good for what is great, you will stay exactly where you are.

Your results are a mirror of your
sacrifices. Look in the mirror honestly.

What are you willing to sacrifice this month?
Comment your commitment. Follow for real success.
